_note: Temporary mock snapshot of the recruitment system. Recruitment is the source of truth for GUIDES ONLY. Teams are NOT modeled upstream — they live natively in this system (see TeamRef). Training materials will eventually come from here too; the array is present as a placeholder so the import contract is forward-compatible. Edit this file to change what the 'Import from recruitment' button surfaces. When real live sync lands, /api/recruitment/* endpoints will call the live recruitment API instead of reading this file — the import endpoints that consume them stay unchanged.
